docs.title: ArgoCD — GitOps Continuous Delivery
docs.description: Pull-based GitOps continuous delivery using ArgoCD for LuckyPlans.

frontMatter.title: ArgoCD — GitOps Continuous Delivery
frontMatter.description: Pull-based GitOps continuous delivery using ArgoCD for LuckyPlans.

docs.title: CI/CD Pipeline
docs.description: Automated pipeline using GitHub Actions and ArgoCD for the LuckyPlans monorepo.

frontMatter.title: CI/CD Pipeline
frontMatter.description: Automated pipeline using GitHub Actions and ArgoCD for the LuckyPlans monorepo.

docs.title: Copy-Trading Engine
docs.description: LuckyPlans combines historical research with live copy-trading workflows. The live engine and the simulation engine share concepts, but they should not be treated as the same operational mode.

docs.title: Data Flow
docs.description: The product flow is easiest to understand as a pipeline from raw venue data into research and execution surfaces.

docs.title: Database Design
docs.description: LuckyPlans uses PostgreSQL through Prisma. The current implementation is broad, but the table below captures the main concepts without dumping the full schema.

docs.title: Functional Decomposition over Domain-Driven Services
docs.description: Chose functional decomposition (service-core for all CRUD) over domain-per-service DDD.

frontMatter.title: Functional Decomposition over Domain-Driven Services
frontMatter.description: Chose functional decomposition (service-core for all CRUD) over domain-per-service DDD.

docs.title: GraphQL Code-First via API Gateway
docs.description: Chose GraphQL code-first with NestJS decorators over REST or schema-first GraphQL.

frontMatter.title: GraphQL Code-First via API Gateway
frontMatter.description: Chose GraphQL code-first with NestJS decorators over REST or schema-first GraphQL.

docs.title: Redis Pub/Sub for Inter-Service Communication
docs.description: Chose Redis pub/sub via NestJS Transport.REDIS over HTTP, gRPC, or full message brokers.

frontMatter.title: Redis Pub/Sub for Inter-Service Communication
frontMatter.description: Chose Redis pub/sub via NestJS Transport.REDIS over HTTP, gRPC, or full message brokers.

docs.title: Switch GraphQL Codegen to client-preset with Inline Operations
docs.description: Replaced three separate codegen plugins and .graphql files with client-preset and inline graphql() calls.

frontMatter.title: Switch GraphQL Codegen to client-preset with Inline Operations
frontMatter.description: Replaced three separate codegen plugins and .graphql files with client-preset and inline graphql() calls.

docs.title: Keycloak OIDC + next-auth v5 for Authentication
docs.description: Adopt Keycloak as the IdP with Authorization Code Flow + PKCE via next-auth v5; validate tokens in the API Gateway using JWKS.

frontMatter.title: Keycloak OIDC + next-auth v5 for Authentication
frontMatter.description: Adopt Keycloak as the IdP with Authorization Code Flow + PKCE via next-auth v5; validate tokens in the API Gateway using JWKS.

docs.title: Nextra v4 Integrated at /docs Route
docs.description: Integrated Nextra v4 (without nextra-theme-docs) at the /docs route inside apps/web.

frontMatter.title: Nextra v4 Integrated at /docs Route
frontMatter.description: Integrated Nextra v4 (without nextra-theme-docs) at the /docs route inside apps/web.

docs.title: Custom Login/Register Pages with ROPC + Keycloak Admin API
docs.description: Replace Keycloak UI redirects and nginx proxy with custom Next.js auth pages, gateway ROPC login, Admin API registration, and Next.js rewrites.

frontMatter.title: Custom Login/Register Pages with ROPC + Keycloak Admin API
frontMatter.description: Replace Keycloak UI redirects and nginx proxy with custom Next.js auth pages, gateway ROPC login, Admin API registration, and Next.js rewrites.

docs.title: Gateway-Managed Sessions (replacing next-auth)
docs.description: Move OAuth token management from the Next.js frontend into the API Gateway with Redis-backed server-side sessions.

frontMatter.title: Gateway-Managed Sessions (replacing next-auth)
frontMatter.description: Move OAuth token management from the Next.js frontend into the API Gateway with Redis-backed server-side sessions.

docs.title: Bitnami Sealed Secrets for Production
docs.description: Use Bitnami Sealed Secrets to manage production secrets safely in Git.

frontMatter.title: Bitnami Sealed Secrets for Production
frontMatter.description: Use Bitnami Sealed Secrets to manage production secrets safely in Git.

docs.title: PostgreSQL Persistence with Prisma ORM
docs.description: Add PostgreSQL as the application database via Prisma ORM in a dedicated packages/prisma package

docs.title: Gateway-Owned Domain Logic with External Edge Orchestration
docs.description: Current architecture keeps client-facing domain logic in api-gateway and uses external edge runtimes for distributed execution.

frontMatter.title: Gateway-Owned Domain Logic with External Edge Orchestration
frontMatter.description: Current architecture keeps client-facing domain logic in api-gateway and uses external edge runtimes for distributed execution.

docs.title: Defer Edge WebSocket Sessions
docs.description: Current edge orchestration remains on authenticated internal REST polling and connectivity heartbeats; persistent WebSocket sessions are deferred until low-latency command needs justify them.

frontMatter.title: Defer Edge WebSocket Sessions
frontMatter.description: Current edge orchestration remains on authenticated internal REST polling and connectivity heartbeats; persistent WebSocket sessions are deferred until low-latency command needs justify them.

docs.title: Defer Generic Task Artifact Transfer
docs.description: Current edge task payloads and results remain on internal REST JSON endpoints; object-storage artifact transfer is deferred until task data grows beyond that contract.

frontMatter.title: Defer Generic Task Artifact Transfer
frontMatter.description: Current edge task payloads and results remain on internal REST JSON endpoints; object-storage artifact transfer is deferred until task data grows beyond that contract.
